notes: Launch targets are editable. Elite date assumes three-lane parallel build (Cursor S09-S13 / Codex S14-S20 / Claude S21-S39), not sequential S00-S39. Edit this file and refresh the page — no rebuild required.

platforms.name: Elite Vantage Greenfield

platforms.summary: Three-lane parallel greenfield per Codex session 019f5c7b-6a3a-7601-a9cd-3745eed4a0c1: Cursor=S09–S13, Codex=S14–S20, Claude=S21–S39. Codex alleges full S14–S20 implementation complete and is in adversarial audit/hardening now (backend+browser gap fixes still landing). Main formal PASS remains S00–S08; S09 committed on codex/S14toS20. Launch clock uses longest remaining lane (Claude S21–S39 ≈19) + integrate/certify — not 23 sequential leftover sprints.

detail_sections.title: Parallel lane model (Codex session 019f5c7b…)
detail_sections.body: User mandate captured 2026-07-13 13:17 EDT: Codex builds S14–S20 to full completion while Cursor builds S09–S13 and Claude handles S21–S39. Codex worktree D:/Elite-Vantage/elite-vantage on codex/S14toS20; Claude worktree D:/Elite-Vantage/ev-claude-s21to39 on claude/S21toS39. As of ~15:14 EDT Codex messages report S14–S20 core impl + PostGIS/RLS/frontend green, then browser and security adversarial audit fixing remaining gaps — treat as IMPLEMENTATION CLAIMED / AUDIT OPEN, not formal PASS.

detail_sections.title: Launch clock math
detail_sections.body: Old Oct 15 assumed mostly-sequential ~32 leftover sprints. With three concurrent lanes, wall-clock ≈ max(Cursor residual S10–S13, Codex audit/merge, Claude S21–S39) + integrate/pilot. Claude’s 19 is the long pole. Codex cleared a 7-sprint band in ~one session day; applying aggressive parallel pace to Claude + ~1 week integrate/S38–S39 pilot buffer → target 2026-08-08 (~3.5 weeks from scan), ~68 days earlier than Oct 15.

detail_sections.title: Progress model
detail_sections.body: 40 build-books. Countdown completed=17 = main PASS S00–S08 (9) + S09 + Codex S14–S20 impl claim (7). Formal ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA PASS remains S00–S08 only until Cursor spine + Codex audit + clean merge.
